entry.title: MÁDARA Velvet Wear Matte Cream Lipstick, #33 Magma
entry.summary:
Vendor: MADARA
Type: Lipstick
Price: 24.90

This velvety, ultra-spreadable lipstick glides onto the lips easily and effortlessly, ensuring a beautiful colour payoff, comfortable wear and soft satin finish. The antioxidant-bursting formula with blueberry seed oil and shea butter nurtures and protects the skin, ensuring smooth and silky lips. This lipstick is formulated with pure mineral pigments, leaving out synthetic and animal-derived colourants.

How to use: Use elaborately for a classic matte lip look. Apply carelessly and dab it in with fingers to achieve the trendy lip stain effect. Top with your favourite lip gloss for extra shine and dimension.

You can also apply it onto your eyelids and cheeks for a monochrome makeup look.

Ingredients: ORYZA SATIVA (RICE) BRAN OIL; VEGETABLE OIL; RICINUS COMMUNIS (CASTOR) SEED OIL; COCO-CAPRYLATE; DICAPRYLYL CARBONATE; HELIANTHUS ANNUUS (SUNFLOWER) SEED WAX; ORYZA SATIVA (RICE) BRAN WAX; RHUS SUCCEDANEA FRUIT WAX; CAPRYLOYL GLYCERIN/SEBACIC ACID COPOLYMER; CELLULOSE; POLYGLYCERYL-2 TRIISOSTEARATE; SILICA; RHUS VERNICIFLUA PEEL CERA/RHUS SUCCEDANEA FRUIT CERA; TOCOPHEROL; AROMA; BUTYROSPERMUM PARKII (SHEA) BUTTER*; ALUMINUM HYDROXIDE; GLYCOLIPIDS; ASCORBYL PALMITATE; VACCINIUM MYRTILLUS (BLUEBERRY) SEED OIL*; BETAINE; STEVIA REBAUDIANA EXTRACT; TRICALCIUM PHOSPHATE; VANILLIN; CITRUS AURANTIUM PEEL OIL; LIMONENE**; MICA (CI 77019); CI 77491 (IRON OXIDES); CI 77492 (IRON OXIDES); CI 77499 (IRON OXIDES); CI 77891 (TITANIUM DIOXIDE) ; TIN OXIDE; CI 77742 (MANGANESE VIOLET)***

*Ingredients from Organic Farming
**From natural essential oils
***Pure mineral pigments

Please note that ingredient lists may change and slightly vary from time to time. You will always find the most up-to-date information on the actual product packaging.

COSMOS NATURAL certified

entry.title: MÁDARA Dazzle Nights Satin Shine Lipstick, #503 Charisma 3.8g
entry.summary:
Vendor: MADARA
Type: Lipstick
Price: 24.90

Drench your lips in dreamy, pigment-loaded colour and subtle lustre that pay homage to the glistening textures and bold hues of the 80s.

The opulent, vegan formula made with nourishing oils, shea butter and vitamins C+E  goes on smooth, wearing off gradually and delicately while hydrating lips from the inside out. 

Formulated with pure mineral pigments, leaving out synthetic or animal-derived colourants. Dermatologically tested.

How to use: Apply directly to clean, moisturised lips. 

Ingredients: OCTYLDODECANOL; RICINUS COMMUNIS (CASTOR) SEED OIL; POLYGLYCERYL-2 TRIISOSTEARATE; SORBITAN OLIVATE; ORYZA SATIVA (RICE) BRAN OIL; VEGETABLE OIL; HELIANTHUS ANNUUS (SUNFLOWER) SEED WAX; ORYZA SATIVA (RICE) BRAN WAX; RHUS SUCCEDANEA FRUIT WAX; CAPRYLOYL GLYCERIN/SEBACIC ACID COPOLYMER; CELLULOSE; DILINOLEIC ACID/PROPANEDIOL COPOLYMER; GLYCERYL ROSINATE; AROMA; DIPALMITOYL HYDROXYPROLINE; TOCOPHEROL; BUTYROSPERMUM PARKII (SHEA) BUTTER*; MICA (CI 77019)***; RHUS VERNICIFLUA PEEL CERA/RHUS SUCCEDANEA FRUIT CERA; IRVINGIA GABONENSIS KERNEL BUTTER; HYDROGENATED COCO-GLYCERIDES; ALUMINUM HYDROXIDE; ASCORBYL PALMITATE; VACCINIUM MYRTILLUS (BLUEBERRY) SEED OIL*; GLYCOLIPIDS; STEVIA REBAUDIANA EXTRACT; LIMONENE**; TIN OXIDE (CI 77681)***; CI 77742 (MANGANESE VIOLET)***; CI 77891 (TITANIUM DIOXIDE) ***; CI 77491 (IRON OXIDES)***; CI 77499 (IRON OXIDES)***

*Ingredients from Organic Farming
**From natural essential oils
***Pure mineral pigments

100% Natural origin of total
10% Organic of total

Please note that ingredient lists may change and slightly vary from time to time. You will always find the most up-to-date information on the actual product packaging.

COSMOS NATURAL certified

entry.title: MÁDARA Dazzle Nights Satin Shine Lipstick, #501 Flattery 3,8g
entry.summary:
Vendor: MADARA
Type: Lipstick
Price: 24.90

Drench your lips in dreamy, pigment-loaded colour and subtle lustre that pay homage to the glistening textures and bold hues of the 80s.

The opulent, vegan formula made with nourishing oils, shea butter and vitamins C+E  goes on smooth, wearing off gradually and delicately while hydrating lips from the inside out. 

Formulated with pure mineral pigments, leaving out synthetic or animal-derived colourants. Dermatologically tested.

How to use: Apply directly to clean, moisturised lips. For an extra glossy finish, layer MÁDARA Glossy Venom Hydrating Lip Gloss on top.

Ingredients: OCTYLDODECANOL; RICINUS COMMUNIS (CASTOR) SEED OIL; POLYGLYCERYL-2 TRIISOSTEARATE; SORBITAN OLIVATE; ORYZA SATIVA (RICE) BRAN OIL; VEGETABLE OIL; HELIANTHUS ANNUUS (SUNFLOWER) SEED WAX; ORYZA SATIVA (RICE) BRAN WAX; RHUS SUCCEDANEA FRUIT WAX; CAPRYLOYL GLYCERIN/SEBACIC ACID COPOLYMER; CELLULOSE; DILINOLEIC ACID/PROPANEDIOL COPOLYMER; GLYCERYL ROSINATE; MICA (CI 77019)***; AROMA; DIPALMITOYL HYDROXYPROLINE; TOCOPHEROL; BUTYROSPERMUM PARKII (SHEA) BUTTER*; RHUS VERNICIFLUA PEEL CERA/RHUS SUCCEDANEA FRUIT CERA; IRVINGIA GABONENSIS KERNEL BUTTER; HYDROGENATED COCO-GLYCERIDES; ALUMINUM HYDROXIDE; ASCORBYL PALMITATE; VACCINIUM MYRTILLUS (BLUEBERRY) SEED OIL*; GLYCOLIPIDS; STEVIA REBAUDIANA EXTRACT; LIMONENE**; TIN OXIDE (CI 77681)***; CI 77742 (MANGANESE VIOLET)***; CI 77891 (TITANIUM DIOXIDE) ***; CI 77491 (IRON OXIDES)***

*Ingredients from Organic Farming
**From natural essential oils
***Pure mineral pigments

100% Natural origin of total
8% Organic of total

Please note that ingredient lists may change and slightly vary from time to time. You will always find the most up-to-date information on the actual product packaging.

COSMOS NATURAL certified

entry.title: Magrada Lip Balm Melissa 10g
entry.summary:
Vendor: Magrada Organic Cosmetics
Type: Lip Balms
Price: 7.50

The wonderful lemon balm is a powerful natural herb which refreshes your lips as well as your senses with its spirited midsummer aroma.

The silky lip balm cools, smooths, moisturises, and nurtures, adding the effect of healthy and plump lips as a bonus.

  • Valuable organic lemon balm oil with its fresh herbal scent calms your skin and your senses.
  • Organic shea butter is characterised by a higher concentration of fatty acids and vitamins. The butter, which originates from Africa, is also known for its anti-inflammatory properties.
  • Organic castor oil helps to preserve the moisture level of the lips and prevents the loss of moisture through the upper layer of the skin.
  • Organic cocoa butter as a cold-pressed oil is a powerful source of Vitamin E.
  • Organic olive oil is a perfect moisturiser for dry lips.

How to use: The creamy lip butter is suitable for daily use. To treat chapped lips, we recommend using a lip balm just before going to bed.

Ingredients: Olea Europaea Fruit Oil, Cera Alba*, Theobroma Cacao Seed Butter*, Hydrogenated Vegetable Oil, Ricinus Communis Seed Oil*, Persea Gratissima Oil, Helianthus Annuus Seed Oil, Tocopherol (Vitamin E), Opuntia Ficus Indica Seed Oil*,  Butyrospermum Parkii Butter, Parfum (Natural), Citral, Geraniol, Linalool, Limonene, Citronellol, Eugenol

*COSMOS Certified Organic Ingredient

Ingredients of natural origin: 100%

The list of ingredients may be changed. Please see the packaging for the updated and most accurate list of ingredients.

paraben-free | sulphate-free | silicone-free | alcohol-free | EU allergen-free | vegan | cruelty-free | hand-made | with a minimal list of ingredients

entry.title: Magrada Lip Balm Marigold 10g
entry.summary:
Vendor: Magrada Organic Cosmetics
Type: Lip Balms
Price: 7.50

The orange marigold blossoms are simply full of life! And it is not only the appearance of the sunny plant which is powerful – this summer flower known from our gardens at home also contains large amounts of bioflavonoids and antioxidants, which help to calm the rough and dry surface of the lips.

The wonderful softening touch of the marigold makes the lips smooth and gives them a healthy, bright shine. As a bonus, the creamy composition of the lip balm has smoothing and tightening properties.

  • Organic marigold extract calms dry, sensitive, and irritated skin. As a strong antioxidant, the extract protects the surface of the lips from the negative impacts of external factors.
  • Organic shea butter is characterised by a higher concentration of fatty acids and vitamins. The butter, which originates from Africa, is also known for its anti-inflammatory properties.
  • Organic castor oil helps to preserve the moisture level of the lips and prevents the loss of moisture through the upper layer of the skin.
  • Organic cocoa butter as a cold-pressed oil is a powerful source of Vitamin E.
  • Organic olive oil is a perfect moisturiser for dry lips.

How to use: The creamy lip butter is suitable for daily use. To treat chapped lips, we recommend using a lip balm just before going to bed.

Ingredients: Olea Europaea Fruit Oil, Cera Alba*, Theobroma Cacao Seed Butter*, Hydrogenated Vegetable Oil, Helianthus Annuus Seed Oil, Persea Gratissima Oil, Ricinus Communis Seed Oil*, Tocopherol (Vitamin E), Hippophae Rhamnoides Oil, Opuntia Ficus Indica Seed Oil*, Butyrospermum Parkii Butter, Calendula Officinalis Flower Extract

*COSMOS Certified Organic Ingredient

Ingredients of natural origin: 100%

The list of ingredients may be changed. Please see the packaging for the updated and most accurate list of ingredients.

paraben-free | sulphate-free | silicone-free | alcohol-free | EU allergen-free | fragrance-free | cruelty-free | hand-made | with a minimal list of ingredients

entry.title: HOIA Lip Balm with Ectoine 14ml
entry.summary:
Vendor: HOIA
Type: Lip Balms
Price: 11.90

HOIA Lip Balm with Ectoine is a lip balm containing ectoine, an active ingredient that protects the skin in extreme conditions. This balm is a true lifesaver for your lips, especially in autumn and winter in our climate. In addition, the lip balm contains deeply hydrating hyaluronic acid, nourishing oils, and butters.

The lip balm moisturizes and protects your lips, leaving them wonderfully soft.

How to use: Apply on lips.

Ingredients: *Cocos Nucifera oil, *Theobroma Cacao butter, Ectoin, *Cera Alba, Fragaria Ananassa oil, Punica Granatum oil, Gardenia Tahitensis Flower Extract, Sodium Hyaluronate, Ricinus Communis seed oil, Hydronated Ricinus Communis Seed oil, Helianthus Annuus Seed oil, Tocopherol, Fragaria Ananassa Fruit extract. *Organic. **Natural component of essential oil.

Handmade in Saaremaa

entry.title: BERRICHI Lip Balm 9g
entry.summary:
Vendor: Berrichi
Type: Lip Balms
Price: 13.90

Have you been dreaming of a lip balm that would provide instant relief to chapped lips, effectively prevent further cracking, and all with pure natural ingredients? Lip balm full of Berrich’s natural goodies can do just that.

The powerful antioxidant astaxanthin from Nordic algae moisturizes and cares lips deep. Milk thistle oil soothes irritated lips, babassu oil makes them soft and apricot kernel oil adds healthy vitamins.

The lip balm contains a lot of nutrients and fatty acids that accelerate cell renewal and healing of irritated lips. Candelilla wax (vegetable wax obtained from milkweed) leaves an invisible protective layer on the lips.

  • Provides instant relief to chapped and irritated lips.
  • Softens and moisturizes deeply.
  • Contains five beneficial oils (cacay, rice, babassu, apricot kernel and milk thistle), cocoa butter, candelabra and astaxanthin.

The lip balm is also a good base for lip makeup.

Suitable for vegans. Free of parabens, silicones and synthetic fragrances and dyes.

Lip balm is fragrance- and preservative-free and comes in environmentally friendly packaging.

How to use: The lipstick can be pushed up from the bottom with your finger. Push the lipstick to the desired level and apply the balm to the lips.

Ingredients: Organic Silybum Marianum (Milk Thistle) Seed Oil*, Organic Prunus Armeniaca (Apricot) Kernel Oil*, Euphorbia Cerifera Cera (Candelilla Wax), Caryodendron Orinocensa (Cacay) Seed Oil, Organic Oryza Sativa (Rice) Bran Oil*, Organic Theobroma Cacao Seed Butter*, Organic Orbignya Oleifera (Babassu) Seed Oil*, Haematococcus Pulvialis Oil, Astaxanthin, Tocopherol.

* Ingredients from organic farming

entry.title: NURME Protective Vitamin Lip Balm 4,5g
entry.summary:
Vendor: Nurme
Type: Lip Balms
Price: 5.90

With cocoa butter and vitamin E. Protects from the cold, wind and sun. Softens and moisturizes the lips and prevents chapping. Extremely long-lasting, truly gentle and with a pleasant fragrance.

Beeswax protects lips from harsh weather conditions and acts as an antiseptic, cocoa butter moisturises lips, vitamin E regenerates skin cells and avocado oil nourishes and revitalises damaged lips.

How to use: Apply to lips.

Vitamin lip balm is also great for little ones, so feel free to put it in your school and kindergarten kid’s pocket.

Ingredients: Cera Alba (Beeswax), Theobroma Cacao (Cocoa) Seed Butter, Persea Gratissima (Avocado) Oil, Tocopherol (Vitamin-E), Citrus Nobilis (Mandarin) Peel Oil, Helianthus Annuus (Sunflower) Seed Oil (and) Beta Carotene, Limonene*, Linalool*. 
*Occurs naturally in essential oils.

entry.title: NURME Protective Mint Lip Balm for Men 4,5g
entry.summary:
Vendor: Nurme
Type: Lip Balms
Price: 5.90

With cocoa butter and vitamin E. Lip balm for men protects against cold, wind and sun. Softens lips and prevents chapping. The lip balm has a pleasantly refreshing mint scent.

How to use: Apply to lips.

Ingredients: Cera Alba (Beeswax), Theobroma Cacao (Cocoa) Seed Butter, Persea Gratissima (Avocado) Oil, Tocopherol (Vitamin-E), Mentha Viridis (Spearmint) Leaf Oil, Limonene*, Linalool*. * Occurs naturally in essential oils.

entry.title: NURME Protective Mint Lip Balm 4,5g
entry.summary:
Vendor: Nurme
Type: Lip Balms
Price: 5.90

With cocoa butter and vitamin E. Protects from the cold, wind and sun. Softens the lips and prevents chapping.

How to use: Apply to lips.

Ingredients: Cera Alba (Beeswax), Theobroma Cacao (Cocoa) Seed Butter, Persea Gratissima (Avocado) Oil, Tocopherol (Vitamin-E), Mentha Viridis (Spearmint) Leaf Oil, Limonene*, Linalool*. * Occurs naturally in essential oils.

entry.title: HEJ Organic Peptide Lip Treatment 8ml
entry.summary:
Vendor: Hej
Type: Lip Balms
Price: 5.90

Peptides moisturize your lips, make them shiny and make them look fuller. Castor oil and shea butter make the glazed look perfect. 

  • Glossy finish with care effect
  • Peptides ensure plump lips with a smoothing effect
  • Moisturizing thanks to rinizus oil and shea butter
  • Can also be used as an overnight treatment
  • 100% fragrance-free & vegan

How to use: Apply evenly to your lips. As an overnight treatment, you can leave a larger amount on overnight.

Ingredients: Ricinus Communis Seed Oil*, Hydroxystearic/Linolenic/Oleic Polyglycerides, Butyrospermum Parkii Butter, Polyglyceryl-3 Polyricinoleate, Euphorbia Cerifera Cera, Pentaerythrityl Tetraisostearate, Palmitoyl Hexapeptide-12, Raphanus Sativus Root Extract, Helianthus Annuus Seed Oil, Tocopherol, Caprylic/Capric Triglyceride, Stearalkonium Hectorite, Propylene Carbonate, Citric Acid

entry.title: Magrada Peach Plump Lip Balm 10ml
entry.summary:
Vendor: Magrada Organic Cosmetics
Type: Lip Balms
Price: 10.90

Indulge your lips with this luscious lip balm, enriched with botanical oils for that perfect shine. If you crave maximum hydration and irresistibly soft, plump lips, this balm is just for you! Immerse yourself in the delightful notes of fresh peach, perfectly blended with nourishing candelilla wax, olive oil, castor oil, and vitamin E. Unique formula not only restores your lips’ natural softness but also locks in moisture for a fuller, more vibrant look. Plus, you can feel good about your choice—our fully recyclable packaging keeps your beauty routine eco-friendly.

How to use: Apply to clean lips as desired. Perfect for use as a nourishing lip balm before applying lipstick or as a glossy finish over lip balm or lip liner.

Ingredients: Hydroxystearic/Linolenic/OleicPolyglycerides, Olea Europaea (Olive) Fruit Oil, Ricinus Communis (Castor) Seed Oil, Glycerin, Candelilla Cera, Polyglyceryl-3 Diisostearate, Hydrogenated Castor Oil, Dipalmitoyl Hydroxyproline, Tocopherol (Vitamin E), Linalool, Limonene

Ingredients of natural origin: 100%

The list of ingredients may be changed. Please see the packaging for the updated and most accurate list of ingredients.

paraben-free | sulphate-free | silicone-free | alcohol-free | vegan | cruelty-free | with a minimal list of ingredients

entry.title: Magrada Blueberry Tinted Lip Balm 10ml
entry.summary:
Vendor: Magrada Organic Cosmetics
Type: Lip Balms
Price: 10.90

This balm's delightful lightweight formula melts seamlessly into your lips, leaving behind a gorgeous blueberry hue and a radiant, natural shine. Embrace beauty while making a conscious choice—crafted from 100% vegan ingredients and wrapped in eco-friendly packaging, this balm is truly a beauty essential.

How to use: Apply to clean lips as desired. Perfect for use as a nourishing lip balm before applying lipstick or as a glossy finish over lip balm or lip liner.

Ingredients: Hydroxystearic/Linolenic/OleicPolyglycerides, Olea Europaea (Olive) Fruit Oil, Ricinus Communis (Castor) Seed Oil, Glycerin, Polyglyceryl-3 Diisostearate, Hydrogenated Castor Oil, Candelilla Cera, Aroma (Flavor), CI 77019/Mica, Dipalmitoyl Hydroxyproline, CI77163/Bismuth Oxychloride, CI 77491/Iron Oxide, Tocopherol (Vitamin E), Stevia Rebaudiana (Sweetleaf) Extract

Ingredients of natural origin: 100%

The list of ingredients may be changed. Please see the packaging for the updated and most accurate list of ingredients.

paraben-free | sulphate-free | silicone-free | alcohol-free | EU allergen-free | vegan | cruelty-free | with a minimal list of ingredients

entry.title: MÁDARA Plum Plum Lip Balm 15ml
entry.summary:
Vendor: MADARA
Type: Lip Balms
Price: 10.40

Intense hydration and heavenly softness from the very first application. Use alone for a sheer finish or as a base for your favorite lipstick. Lips stay soft, protected and hydrated to perfection. Formulated with deeply moisturising jojoba oil, shea butter and plum oil.

How to use: Apply to clean, dry lips. Reapply whenever necessary. Use alone for a sheer finish or as a base for your favourite lipstick.

Ingredients: Ricinus Communis (Castor) Seed Oil, Simmondsia Chinensis (Jojoba) Seed Oil, Cera Alba (Beeswax), Sorbitan olivate, Butyrospermum Parkii (Shea) Butter, Prunus Domestica (Plum) Seed Oil, Aroma, Tocopherol, Calendula Officinalis (Calendula) Flower Extract, Chamomilla Recutita (Camomile) Flower Extract, Hippophae Rhamnoides (Sea Buckthorn) Fruit Extract, Propolis Extract, Stevia Rebaudiana Extract, CI 77491 (Iron Oxides), Limonene, Linalool

* Please note that ingredient lists may change and slightly vary from time to time. You will always find the most up-to-date information on the actual product packaging.

entry.title: HEJ Organic The Lover Lip Balm Cactus 4,7g
entry.summary:
Vendor: Hej
Type: Lip Balms
Price: 3.90

With a lip balm, you give your lips moisture and intensive care. Unfortunately, most lip balms contain mineral oil, which acts as a film on your skin and dries it out even more. As a result, you feel the need to apply more and more cream. With Hej Lover Lip Balm, this can't happen to you! It contains 100% natural and high-quality ingredients that nourish and moisturize your lips instead of taking them away.

  • Makes the lips soft immediately
  • Suitable for daily use
  • Nourishes with prickly pear seed oil, castor and argan oil
  • 100% natural/ 100% vegan

How to use: Apply daily on the lips if necessary

Ingredients: Ricinus Communis (Castor) Seed Oil [1], Rhus Verniciflua Peel Cera, Olea Europaea Fruit Oil [1], Candelilla Cera, (Euphorbia Cerifera) Wax, Butyrum (clarified butter) [1], Copernica Cerifera (Carnauba) Wax [1], Theobroma Cacao, (Cocoa) Seed Butter [1], Argania Spinosa (Argan) Kernel Oil [1], Simmondsia Chinensis (Jojoba) Seed Oil [1], Perfume (Fragrance) [2], Opuntia Ficus-Indica Seed Oil [1], Tocopherol [1], Glycerin[1], Limonene [2], Helianthus Annuus (Sunflower) Seed Oil, Linalool [2], Citral [2], Aqua (Water), Citronellol [2], Citrus Paradisi Fruit Extract [1], Geraniol [2] 1. from controlled organic agriculture 2. from natural essential oils

Organic | Cruelty Free | Vegan | Natural Resources

entry.title: HOIA Restoring Shimmering Lip Balm with Marigold 5,5ml
entry.summary:
Vendor: HOIA
Type: Lip Balms
Price: 6.90

HOIA new lip balm (5.5 ml) is a particularly caring butter for lips made from organically grown marigolds in Saaremaa, to which melissa essential oil has been added as a bonus, which has a preventive effect on herpes and helps to keep the lips healthy. In the composition of lip balm you can find an as-yet unrefined deep-caring shea butter, cocoa butter and raspberry seed oil containing omega 3 fatty acids.

With a light pink sheen.

How to use: Apply the appropriate amount to the lips.

Ingredients: *Butyrospermun Parkii Seed Butter, Cera Alba, *Cocos Nucifera Oil, *Calendula Ocinalis Flower Extract, *Theobroma Cacao Seed Butter, Rubus Ideasus Seed oil, *Melissa Ocinalis Leaf oil, Helianthus Annuus Seed oil, Tocopherol, Citral, Citronellol, Geraniol, Limonene, Linalool. *Organic.

The pink glossy version contains mica of natural mineral origin.

Handmade in Saaremaa

entry.title: HOIA Restoring Lip Balm with Marigold 5,5ml
entry.summary:
Vendor: HOIA
Type: Lip Balms
Price: 6.90

HOIA new lip balm (5.5 ml) is a particularly caring butter for lips made from organically grown marigolds in Saaremaa, to which melissa essential oil has been added as a bonus, which has a preventive effect on herpes and helps to keep the lips healthy. In the composition of lip balm you can find an as-yet unrefined deep-caring shea butter, cocoa butter and raspberry seed oil containing omega 3 fatty acids.

How to use: Apply the appropriate amount to the lips.

Ingredients: *Butyrospermun Parkii Seed Butter, Cera Alba, *Cocos Nucifera Oil, *Calendula Ocinalis Flower Extract, *Theobroma Cacao Seed Butter, Rubus Ideasus Seed oil, *Melissa Ocinalis Leaf oil, Helianthus Annuus Seed oil, Tocopherol, Citral, Citronellol, Geraniol, Limonene, Linalool. *Organic.

Handmade in Saaremaa

entry.title: HOIA Shimmering Lip Balm 12ml
entry.summary:
Vendor: HOIA
Type: Lip Balms
Price: 8.90

Shimmering Lip Balm with mandarin aroma protects lips from sun, wind and environment, it nourishes and moisturizes lips effectively leaving your lips shimmering! Lip Balm contains unrefined shea butter, cocoa butter, raspberry seed oil with natural sun protectin, lip-protecting beeswax, amazing argan oil and tropical mandarin essential oil. Lip Balm helps to keep you lips healthy, soft and silky smooth. Shimmering particles in the product are plastic-free and of mineral origin, they do not harm environment.

How to use: Apply on lips.

Ingredients: *Butyrospermum Parkii butter, Rubus Idaeus seed oil, *Cera Alba, *Theobroma Cacao butter, *Argania Spinose Kernel oil, *Citrus Reticulata peel oil, Tocopherol, **Limonene, Mica, ***CI 77491, ***Ci 77861, ***CI 77891, Fluorphlogopite. *From organic farming. **Natural component of essential oil. ***Plastic Free mineral components of Mica.

Handmade in Saaremaa
